New Melle, Missouri

Our Story

The Quarry

26 Acres of
Natural Beauty

The Quarry is unlike any wedding venue in Missouri. Carved from the land itself, our 26-acre property in New Melle combines the raw beauty of a natural quarry lake with elegant indoor and outdoor event spaces that have been thoughtfully designed to make every wedding feel truly one-of-a-kind.

Whether you envision an intimate indoor ceremony by the fireplace or a grand outdoor celebration on the waterfront patio with string lights reflecting off the quarry lake — we have the perfect space waiting for you.

26 Acres of Property

Expansive natural grounds surrounding a breathtaking quarry lake

5 Venue Spaces

From intimate indoor settings to grand waterfront celebrations

2× Award Winners

Recognized on The Knot for excellence in 2025 & 2026

∞ Memories Made

Every couple leaves with a day they'll never forget

The Venue

Elegant Spaces,
Unforgettable Moments

Step inside The Quarry and you'll find spaces that blend rustic warmth with refined elegance. Our signature stone bar — a stunning centerpiece — sets the tone for celebrations that feel both grand and intimate. The fireplace lounge, the dining hall, and the outdoor patios all tell a cohesive story of a place built for love.

The Property

Where Nature
Becomes Your Backdrop

The quarry lake is the crown jewel of our property — a stunning body of water that creates a magical setting for ceremonies, photos, and celebrations. Surrounded by natural stone and mature trees, the waterfront patio is one of the most photographed wedding locations in Missouri.

View the Gallery
Ready to See It?

Come Experience
The Quarry

Nothing compares to walking the property in person. Schedule a private tour and let us show you why The Quarry is the most unique wedding venue in Missouri.
